---
title: "Mangrove Youtube Documentation"  
description: "The brief records of the mangrove carbon stock team"  
author: "Muhammad Zamharir"      
date: "2025-10-10"      
categories: [Research]      
image: "movie.png"      
---

## What's New?

When science meets adventure, you get the Mangrove Carbon Squad!.Here I presented to you the video documentation of the mangrove carbon stock team doing its action in one of the sites in Pamurbaya (east coast of Surabaya).

## Account Link🔗

[The video is here 🙌🏼](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x55utK_fPeE)
